name: Ham Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ham slices in half.
2. Cut the cheese into strips.
3. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
4. In a small bowl, beat together the butter, onion, poppy seeds, Dijon mustard, and Worcestershire sauce until well combined.
5. Split the dinner rolls open on one side.
6. Spread the butter mixture evenly onto both cut sides of each roll.
7. Place one piece of ham and one slice of cheese on the bottom half of each roll.
8. Replace the tops of the rolls and place them on a baking sheet, covered loosely with foil.
9. Bake for 15 minutes or until the cheese begins to melt.
These freeze very well.
Nutritional Information:
Per appetizer: 135 calories, 8 g total fat (3 g saturated), 264 mg sodium, 20 mg cholesterol, 10 g carbohydrates, 6 g protein.
